Notes
(a) Reflected at cost, with adjustments as necessary to reflect material changes.
(b) Reflected at fair market value, marked to market (MTM) monthly.
(c) Participates in Employee Stock Purchase Plan (ESPP). Shares purchased at a 5% discount on market price at end of purchase period. Recognized as income at purchase and reflected at cost.
(d) 10 unvested RSUs after-tax: 6 RSUs vest Nov 1, 2027; 4 RSUs vest Feb 15, 2027. Recognized as income upon vesting, reflected at cost.
(e) Prepaid parking card for BNY Pittsburgh locations. Reloadable, non-interest bearing. Max balance $200.

Less: 401(k) inflowsPT deferrals + company match — locked −$7,260.01
Cash Income $24,326.50
Total Expenses −$17,235.37
Net Cash Flow +$7,091.13
Math
($31,586.51 − $17,235.37) ÷ $31,586.51 × 100
= 45.4% savings rate
Income matches the Income Statement (includes 401(k)). 401(k) inflows are stripped from Net Cash Flow because the money routes directly to a locked retirement account — income, but not spendable cash. Savings Rate is accrual-based and treats the 401(k) contribution as savings.

= 45.4%

Tax impact: only realized gains hit your IS. These unrealized gains/losses sit in AOCI on the BS and only become real when you sell. Roth IRA gains are tax-free regardless.

Early Warning Indicator — Tiers
Low < 10%
Normal 10 – 30%
Elevated 30 – 60%
High 60 – 90%
Critical ≥ 90%
Most scoring models reward staying below 30%; below 10% is ideal. Tiers flag risk levels rather than rate performance.
Export / Backup
⬇ Export Full App — Self-Contained HTML
Exports the entire app as a standalone HTML file with all your data baked in. Open in any browser — no server, no login needed. Your best safety valve.
Data-Only Backups
Exports data only — requires the app to restore. Use for version control / change management.
🖨 Print / Save as PDF
Generates a clean black-on-white financial statement and opens the print dialog. Choose Save as PDF in your browser.
🔄 Auto-Save History
Last 5 auto-saves are kept in browser storage. Click any to restore.

⚠ Restore from JSON Backup
Paste a previously exported JSON backup below. This will overwrite ALL current data.
Change Management:
Use Export App + Data before major edits — it captures the shell + all data in one file. Store copies with date stamps. The auto-save history gives you a 5-version rollback right in the browser.

1.06 +1.06 995.80
FY2025 Ending Balance 994.74
Edit Journal Entry
Account Debit Credit
Split with Hannah
Pulls Hannah's share off each expense debit and books an offsetting debit to Accounts Receivable. Cash/credit lines are unchanged.
Expense total $0.00
% and $ stay in sync. The split applies on save — your existing lines stay editable until then.
Add Lot
Enter any two of the three fields — the third auto-calculates. Set all three to override total (e.g. for rounding).
Price API Settings
Paste your Cloudflare Worker URL. The worker should accept ?symbols=VOO,IRM and return {"VOO":540.12,"IRM":109.45}. Leave blank to skip live prices.
Add Auto Loan Payment
Record Mom Loan Payment
Delete Journal Entry?
Add Account
Add Ticker
Add Subscription
Edit Position
Lots
Apply Stock Split
:
e.g. 8-for-1 split → enter 8 : 1. Reverse 1-for-2 split → enter 1 : 2.
Record Sale
Edit Lot
Add Footnote
Edit Credit Card
Limit drives utilization. APR drives monthly interest and annual cost-of-carry projections. Leave blank or enter 0 to remove. Neither field affects account balances.
